{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032316205323B8CB7FFC0368A1E6D7"}"},"total":22},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7572813679378121497","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"故事好  有能力 让一地方慢慢变好  期待"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763185576,"group_id":"7509520912689925145","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NysvM5o6W7jRV0odx+EW0Sc=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"104932372433","user_name":"爱吃鱿鱼粥的央吉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"104932372433","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7509520912689925145","book_info":{"abstract":"［种田+朝堂+养娃+架空+日常+轻松］
［评分刚出有点低，会涨的哈］
皇甫锦棠魂穿亲王世子，从小女扮男装，一招换芯，草包变身，抽身风起云涌的京城。
种田、基建、经商……带领百姓脱贫致富，贫瘠的荒漠开出了玫瑰，干涸的河床变成了浩浩荡荡的河流......
战神王爷问：“你这么拼命，图什么？”
皇甫锦棠：“图那皇位。你信吗？”  
顶级皇商：“你又不贪财，要那么多钱干什么？”
皇甫锦棠：“家里养着一只吞金兽。”
年轻首辅：“世家无人不恨你。”
皇甫锦棠：“我就喜欢看他们恨我又干不掉我的样子。”
